title: Payroll Document Link
scenario: You receive a message claiming HR needs you to review a payroll document. The link opens a login page that looks like your company portal but the web address is unfamiliar.

answers.A: Log in because payroll documents are important.
answers.B: Try my password and change it later if something looks wrong.
answers.C: Close the page and open the HR portal from the official company bookmark.
answers.D: Report the suspicious link to IT or security.

explanation: Fake HR and payroll pages are used to steal employee credentials. The safest move is to use the official portal and report the suspicious link.
proTip: A familiar-looking login page is not enough. The domain and access path must also be trusted.
